mapper.select: SELECT * FROM microbe_abundance WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY sample_date DESC

SELECT standard_abundance_id AS abundance_id, patient_id, sample_id, sample_date, microbe_name_standard AS microbe_name, abundance_value, abundance_unit AS unit, normalization_method AS method FROM microbe_abundance_standard WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY sample_date DESC, sample_id ASC, microbe_name_standard ASC

SELECT standard_abundance_id AS abundance_id, patient_id, sample_id, sample_date, microbe_name_standard AS microbe_name, abundance_value, abundance_unit AS unit, normalization_method AS method FROM microbe_abundance_standard WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND sample_id = #{sampleId} ORDER BY abundance_value DESC, microbe_name_standard ASC

SELECT standard_abundance_id AS abundance_id, patient_id, sample_id, sample_date, microbe_name_standard AS microbe_name, abundance_value, abundance_unit AS unit, normalization_method AS method FROM microbe_abundance_standard WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND sample_id = #{sampleId} ORDER BY abundance_value DESC, microbe_name_standard ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT patient_id, sample_id, MAX(sample_date) AS sample_date, COUNT(*) AS feature_count, SUM(abundance_value) AS abundance_total FROM microbe_abundance_standard WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} GROUP BY patient_id, sample_id ORDER BY sample_date DESC, sample_id ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT P.patient_id) AS patient_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(M.patient_id, ':', M.sample_id)) AS sample_count FROM patients P JOIN microbe_abundance_standard M ON P.patient_id = M.patient_id WHERE LOWER(TRIM(P.disease)) = 'healthy'
AND P.body_site = #{bodySite}
SELECT * FROM cytokine_abundance WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY sample_date DESC
SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE patient_name = #{patientName}
SELECT P.patient_id FROM patients P JOIN patient_diseases PD ON P.patient_id = PD.patient_id JOIN diseases D ON PD.disease_id = D.disease_id WHERE D.disease_name = #{diseaseName}

SELECT patient_id, patient_name, age, gender, disease, risk_score, risk_level FROM patients
AND patient_id = #{queryValue}
AND patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryValue}, '%')
AND disease LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryValue}, '%')
ORDER BY patient_id ASC
